title: Trust_Irrevocable Accounts Misclassified as Single Depositor
description: TRUST-DAILY-BATCH-20260316 detected that all Trust_Irrevocable (IRR) accounts are being processed under ORC=SGL (Single) fallback because the IRR branch was never implemented in TRUST-INSURANCE-CALC.cob. 253 IRR accounts totalling approximately $61.8M in coverage gap are affected. Fiduciary documentation obligation under 12 CFR § 330.13 has not been met.
defect_description: IRR ownership category branch not implemented in COBOL — falls back to SGL
